item.title: NUCLRGOLF: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 1h #DISCUSSION: Without telling us your handicap, what's a line you say at least 20 times every
item.description: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 1h #DISCUSSION: Without telling us your handicap, what's a line you say at least 20 times every round? 538 33 168 87 mil

item.title: NoLayingUp: No Laying Up @NoLayingUp · 3h If you can make it through the drivel, you'll hear O'Neil mention the volume of "unnamed s
item.description:
No Laying Up @NoLayingUp · 3h If you can make it through the drivel, you'll hear O'Neil mention the volume of "unnamed sources" in the reporting yesterday, but not actually deny the merits of the reports.
A similar message to his email yesterday. Cita Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 4h Scott O’Neil was on the LIV broadcast earlier and hit a number of topics. 46 11 328 90 mil

item.title:
acaseofthegolf1: Monday Q Info @acaseofthegolf1 · 3h Not sure this is the angle I’d take into the meetings to re-sign Bryson.
(_ @flu
item.description:

item.title: DanOnGolfShow: Dan Rapaport reposteó Dan on Golf @DanOnGolfShow · 9h This week's World Dankings. 12 3 246 37 mil
